Bloodline

2023

About the Project

Bloodline is a real-time strategy analog RPG about vampires, crowns, and inheriting the throne. Made as a part of a university class.

2D Artist

I led the artistic development of the project, creating all cards and characters and directing the overall visual style, even in the rules, to maintain a cohesive and immersive experience for players.

Click the header or here to see the related page on Artstation!
